items.title: Crypto Long & Short: With MSTR concerns assuaged, look to traditional signals around BTC
items.summary: In this week's Crypto Long & Short, FalconX’s Gaspar Martin writes that BTC is reaching a market bottom and is poised for a turnaround.

items.title: Adam Back's BSTR scraps SPAC merger, seeks new deal
items.summary: BSTR and Cantor Equity Partners will not complete their merger under the original July 2025 agreement, with the shareholder postponed indefinitely.

items.title: BNB Chain is building a new layer-1 for high-frequency trading and AI agents
items.summary: The network aims to process over 100,000 transactions per second by streaming them directly, eliminating public queues to make trades faster and more secure.

items.title: Bull Bitcoin asks French court to strike down DAC8 implementing decree
items.summary: The non-custodial Bitcoin exchange petitioned to annul a French decree implementing DAC8, arguing the rules could create surveillance and physical risks for up to 135 million European crypto holders.

items.title: India crypto tax filings lag trading activity: Report
items.summary: India’s tax department reportedly found that fewer than a quarter of the 645,000 people who made crypto transactions reported them on tax returns.

items.title: The 5 types of real world assets being tokenized fastest onchain
items.summary: Tokenized Real World Assets span treasuries, real estate, stocks, commodities and private credit. The sector is still small in TradFi terms but it's growing very, very fast.

items.title: Kazakhstan president signs decree to accelerate crypto adoption
